T* 0. - ' • / _ - -- 2 of 7 -- ANKEXURE The Bombay R e l i e f U n d e r t a k i n g s ( S p e c i a l P r o v i s i o n s Act, 1958g as extended t o t h e Union t e r r i t o r y of Delhi , (Bombay Act 96 of 1958) An Act t o make temporary provisions for i n d u s t r i a l r e l a t i o n s and other matters t o enable the State Government to conduct, or to provide l o a n , gurantee or f i n a n c i a l assistance for the cona.net of," c e r t a i n i n d u s t r i a l undertakings as a measure of preventing unemployment or of unemployment r e l i e f . -\ WHEREAS i t i s expedient t o make temporary provisions for i n d u s t r i a l r e l a t i o n s and other m a t t e r s to enable t h e S t a t e Government to conduct, or t o provide l o a n , guarantee o r financial a s s i s t a n c e for t h e conduct of, c e r t a i n " i n d u s t r i a l undertakings as a/measure of preventing unemployment or of unemployment r e l i e f ; I t i s hereby enacted in the Ninth Year of the Republic of I n d i a as f o l l o w s : - 1 . (1) This Act may be c a l l e d the Bombay Relief Undertakings (Special Provisions) Actt 1958„ (2) I t extends t o the whole of the Union t e r r i t o r y of Delhi, the context 2, i n t h i s Act, unless/otherwise r e q u i r e s , r (1) " Admi n i st r at or" me an s t he Admi ni st r at o r of t h e Union t e r r i t o r y of Delhi appointed by t h e President under a r t i c l e 239 of the C o n s t i t u t i o n ! (1A) "industry" means any b u s i n e s s , t r a d e , under- taking^ manufacture or c a l l i n g of employers and includes any c a l l i n g , s e r v i c e , employment, handicraft or i n d u s t r i a l occupation or v o c a t i o n of .workmen--.. and the word " i n d u s t r i a l " . s h a l l be ' construed accordingly, (2) ' ' r e l i e f undertaking1? means an i n d u s t r i a l undertaking i n respect of which a d"aclr.ration .under section 3 i s i n f o r c e , -- 3 of 7 -- Declaration - of r e l i e f •undertaking . • Power to p r e s c r i b e i n d u s t r i a l : . r e l a t i o n s and other fatali- t i e s tempora- r i l y for" r e l i e f under"* t a k i n g s . 3 r . ~ c a t i o n ; b u t i t s h a l l be renewable by l i k e n o t i f i - cations from time t o time for further periods not exceeding twelve months at a t i m e , so however t h a t a l l the -periods i n the aggregate do not exceed f i f t e e n y e a r s . ; 4 , ( l ) Notwithstanding any law, u s a g e , sustom, c o n t r a c t , instrument, decree, o r d e r , sward, sub- mission, s e t t l e m e n t , standing order or other provision whatsoever, the Skx Administrator1 m ay, by n o t i f i c a t i o n i n the Delhi Gazette. d i r e c t t h a t -
